calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Shirley Ann Hampton As Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Patrick Miller appearing for respondents. John Hanlin appearing for petitioner. Mr. Hanlin raised the rent issue. The property has been sold. It took the filing of this petition to get an accounting and the property sold. Mr. Miller argued that it was the decedent's wish that Mr. Hampton stay in the house for one year. Mr. Hanlin argued that there was no evidentiary support that was her wish. Matter submitted.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

Petition To Remove Shirley Ann Hampton As Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-02-2007 Continued To Mar-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
